title: 'I had so much hope for DLSS in the early days, what a dumpster fire it's turned into': Nvidia tells us more about DLSS 5, but the hate remains strong among gamers
summary: To clarify, DLSS 5 is essentially an AI filter that sits atop the existing DLSS suite of technology. Has Nvidia managed to placate the DLSS 5 haters, then?
